Definition: The year and Julian day on which the simulation will end.
Unique 5-digit code that represents a specific US county.
Number of milkings (per day). The average or most common number of times cows are milked per day (1, 2, or 3 times daily)
Fractions of the milking animal population that are parity 1, 2, and 3 and beyong. The sum of these fractions must be 1.0.
The total milk yield generated by the farm in one year (kg). If this information is not available, it can be input as null.
Fraction of cows assumed to be in milk at any given time.
